_doc: File inventory for the Relatedness Atlas. Round 1 (2026-05-11) ships only the demo-data files (baked into shared/demo_data.js) — the file table below lists the four ngsPedigree-produced files the pillBar slots will target in round 2. Reads go through the atlas-core unified server's static mount (workspace-relative paths, no /file/ prefix) OR through the sandboxed /file/{path} endpoint (longer error messages, allowlisted writes); the loaders in shared/loaders/ accept either. See atlases/relatedness/server/RELATEDNESS_ENDPOINTS.md for the server-side contract.

res._doc: 23-column pairwise table from ngsPedigree Stage 1. Drives the Inspector / Stats panel and the Network panel's edge classes.

family_hub_roster._doc: One row per individual with family_id, hub assignment, role. Drives the Population Browser tree.

per_chrom_qc._doc: Per-chromosome PASS/WARN/FAIL conflict counts per dyad/triad + genome-wide trio QC fields (po_a, po_b, gw_mend_error, anc_dist, valid). Drives the right-column Mendelian-check breakdown.

inversion_karyotypes._doc: Long-format TSV: one row per (sample_id, inversion_id) with karyotype ('0/0'|'0/1'|'1/1'|'NA') + quality. Drives the Karyotypes tab, the Mendelian tester, and the four-stage scoring on the Inversions tab.

inversion_catalogue._doc: Sidecar of inversion_karyotypes.tsv: per-candidate coordinates (chromosome, start_mb, end_mb, length_mb, frequency, status, notes). When absent the karyotype loader falls back to id-only with NaN coords.

ancestry_q.loader: TODO (round 2) — sample_id × K columns; drives the Karyotypes ancestry stripe
ancestry_q._doc: Optional — when absent the page falls back to the synthetic ancestry palette in shared/demo_data.js.

beagle.loader: TODO (round 2) — only the per-chromosome inheritance map is consumed; full beagle is server-side only
beagle._doc: Optional pillBar slot. The atlas never reads the full file directly — ngsPedigree Stage 3 derives the per-chromosome inheritance map from it server-side.

prune.loader: TODO (round 2) — single-column sample list; passed to the cohort Mendelian scan as the 'unrelated' subset
prune._doc: Optional pillBar slot. When loaded, the cohort Mendelian scan uses the pruned subset as the baseline.
